hero.eyebrow: Sports · Events · Street / Photojournalism · Barcelona, ES
hero.eyebrowAria: Sports, events and street photographer based in Barcelona, Spain
hero.subtitle: Photographs by Miguel Pujazón Cárdenas
hero.paragraph: I move between the city and the track, watching for moments that arrive without warning and vanish just as fast. A corner taken at the limit, a stranger caught mid-step, the light that lasts half a second before the city takes it back. I don't set the scene or retouch beyond the grade. Just the frame I caught.

behindTheLens.subtitle: Behind the lens
behindTheLens.quote: "Light is the only material. Everything else is patience — and being in the right place a half-second early."
behindTheLens.paragraph: I'm Miguel. I move between crowds and empty streets, between the intensity of an event and the solitude of a city at first light. The camera doesn't lie.
